top_signals.title: Iran says ’low’ possibility of return to war with U.S.
top_signals.summary: The statement came a day after Iran accused the U.S. of breaching the ceasefire in place since April.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026
top_signals.summary: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026

top_signals.title: Japan weighs criminal penalties for nuclear plant data fraud
top_signals.summary: The plan is being considered following earthquake risk data fraud by Chubu Electric Power over its Hamaoka nuclear power plant in Shizuoka Prefecture.

top_signals.title: Romanian national sentenced to more than 4 years for hacking Oregon government systems
top_signals.summary: Dragomir was arrested in Romania in November 2024 and brought to the U.S. last year to face charges for hacking into the network belonging to Oregon’s Office of Emergency Management.
